title: FMCSA Operating Authority
description: Maintain FMCSA operating authority for interstate motor carriers.

title: Hours of Service
description: Comply with FMCSA hours of service rules for commercial drivers.

title: Electronic Logging Device Mandate
description: Use FMCSA-registered ELDs for HOS recordkeeping.

title: DOT Drug and Alcohol Testing
description: Apply DOT drug and alcohol testing for safety-sensitive employees.

title: Commercial Driver's License Requirements
description: Verify CDL qualifications and medical certification for commercial drivers.

title: Vehicle Inspection and Maintenance
description: Maintain vehicles per FMCSA inspection, repair, and maintenance standards.

title: Carrier Safety Rating
description: Maintain Satisfactory FMCSA safety rating per CSA scoring.

title: Hazardous Materials Transportation
description: Comply with PHMSA HMR for hazmat shipping classification, packaging, and labeling.

title: Hazmat Driver Training
description: Provide hazmat training to drivers per PHMSA HM-126F.

title: Hazmat Security Plan
description: Maintain hazmat security plan for covered shipments per HM-232.

title: IATA Dangerous Goods
description: Comply with IATA DGR for air shipping of dangerous goods.

title: ICAO TI Compliance
description: Comply with ICAO Technical Instructions for air dangerous goods.

title: IMDG Code Sea Shipping
description: Comply with IMDG Code for sea shipping of dangerous goods.

title: ADR European Road Transport
description: Comply with ADR for hazmat road transport in Europe.

title: RID European Rail Transport
description: Comply with RID for hazmat rail transport in Europe.

title: OSHA Warehouse General Industry
description: Apply OSHA general industry standards to warehousing operations.

title: Powered Industrial Truck Operator Training
description: Train and certify powered industrial truck operators per OSHA.

title: Lockout/Tagout for Conveyors
description: Implement LOTO for hazardous energy control during conveyor maintenance.

title: Warehouse Ergonomics
description: Apply ergonomic best practices for warehouse operations.

title: OSHA HazCom for Warehouse
description: Maintain HazCom program for warehouse chemical inventory.

title: TSA Cargo Security Program
description: Comply with TSA cargo security program for indirect air carriers.

title: C-TPAT Trade Partner Security
description: Maintain C-TPAT certification for supply chain security.

title: EU Authorized Economic Operator
description: Maintain AEO status for EU customs simplifications.

title: ISO 28000 Supply Chain Security
description: Implement supply chain security management per ISO 28000.

title: Carmack Amendment Cargo Liability
description: Apply Carmack Amendment liability for interstate motor carriers.

title: Carriage of Goods by Sea Act
description: Apply COGSA liability for ocean cargo carriers.

title: Hague-Visby Rules
description: Apply Hague-Visby Rules for international ocean carriage.

title: Montreal Convention Cargo Liability
description: Apply Montreal Convention cargo liability for international air carriage.

title: CMR Convention Road Carriage
description: Apply CMR Convention for international road cargo carriage in Europe.

title: Customs Entry Filing
description: File timely customs entries with CBP for imports.

title: Automated Export System Filing
description: File EEI through AES for required exports.

title: OFAC Customer Screening
description: Screen consignors and consignees against OFAC SDN list.

title: EAR Export Compliance
description: Apply Export Administration Regulations to dual-use technology shipments.

title: ITAR Defense Article Compliance
description: Apply ITAR to defense article and service shipments.

title: Common Carrier Tariff Publication
description: Publish tariff schedules per USDOT for common carriers.

title: FMC Ocean Carrier License
description: Maintain FMC license for ocean transportation intermediaries.

title: FMC Service Contract Filing
description: File ocean carrier service contracts with FMC.

title: Surface Transportation Board Regulation
description: Comply with STB regulations for rail carriers.

title: FAA FAR Part 121 Air Cargo
description: Comply with FAR Part 121 for scheduled all-cargo air operations.

title: USPS Mailability Standards
description: Comply with USPS DMM for mailable items in commercial mail.

title: Lawful Basis for Customer Data
description: Document lawful basis for shipping customer personal data processing.

title: DSAR Response Within One Month
description: Respond to data subject access requests within one month.

title: 72-Hour Breach Notification
description: Notify supervisory authority of personal data breach within 72 hours.

title: Cross-Border Transfer Safeguards
description: Use SCCs or adequacy decisions for personal data transfers outside EEA.

title: Routing Algorithm Disclosure
description: Provide right not to be subject to solely automated routing decisions with legal effects.

title: California Consumer Privacy
description: Honor CCPA rights for California shipping customers.

title: Carrier Insurance Minimums
description: Maintain FMCSA-required insurance limits per carrier type.

title: Cargo Insurance Coverage
description: Maintain cargo insurance per Inland Marine policy where applicable.

title: EPA Diesel Emission Standards
description: Comply with EPA Tier 4 emissions standards for diesel engines.

title: California ACF Compliance
description: Comply with California ACF rule for diesel medium-/heavy-duty fleets.

title: EPA SmartWay Partnership
description: Pursue EPA SmartWay partnership for fuel-efficient freight.

title: Environmental Management System
description: Establish EMS per ISO 14001 for fleet operations.

title: Road Traffic Safety Management
description: Implement road safety management per ISO 39001.

title: FMCSA Drug and Alcohol Clearinghouse
description: Query FMCSA Clearinghouse for CDL drug and alcohol violations.

title: Rear Impact Guards
description: Comply with FMCSA rear impact guard rules.

title: EU Mobility Package
description: Comply with EU Mobility Package for cross-border road transport in EU.

title: EU Posting of Drivers Directive
description: Apply EU Posting of Drivers Directive in cabotage operations.

title: Lithium Battery Shipping Rules
description: Apply DOT PHMSA lithium battery shipping rules including HM-215P.

title: FAR Part 135 Air Charter
description: Comply with FAR Part 135 for on-demand air charter cargo.

title: FAR Part 91 General Operating Rules
description: Comply with FAR Part 91 general aviation operating rules.

title: Bill of Lading Compliance
description: Issue compliant bills of lading per UCC Article 7 and Pomerene Act.

title: Incoterms 2020 Application
description: Apply correct Incoterms 2020 for international cargo transactions.

title: WTO Trade Facilitation Agreement
description: Comply with WTO Trade Facilitation Agreement for customs procedures.

title: FATCA Compliance for Logistics Banks
description: Apply FATCA reporting where logistics banking operations exist.

title: Anti-Boycott Compliance
description: Comply with US anti-boycott regulations under EAR and IRS.

title: FCPA Anti-Bribery Compliance
description: Avoid corrupt payments to foreign officials in international logistics.

title: UK Bribery Act Compliance
description: Maintain adequate procedures to prevent bribery per Section 7.

title: Modern Slavery Statement
description: Publish annual modern slavery statement for UK businesses with £36M+ turnover.

title: CA Supply Chain Transparency
description: Disclose supply chain anti-slavery efforts per CA TISCA.

title: UFLPA Forced Labor Compliance
description: Verify imports do not include goods from Xinjiang per UFLPA.

title: Conflict Minerals Disclosure
description: Submit Form SD for tin/tantalum/tungsten/gold from DRC region.

title: REACH Chemical Compliance
description: Comply with REACH for chemicals shipped into EU above thresholds.

title: RoHS Compliance for Electronics Shipping
description: Apply RoHS to electronics shipping into EU.

title: WEEE for Returned Electronics
description: Apply WEEE Directive to electronics returned for repair or disposal in EU.

title: EU Packaging and Packaging Waste
description: Comply with EU PPWR for shipping packaging including recycled content.

title: Security Trust Services Criteria
description: Implement controls aligned with AICPA TSC for security.

title: TMS Continuous Monitoring
description: Continuously monitor TMS access with automated alerting.

title: Logistics ISMS
description: Establish ISMS for logistics systems including TMS, WMS, and EDI.

title: Shipment Data Encryption
description: Apply ISO 27001 cryptographic controls to shipment manifests and EDI.

title: ANSI X12 EDI Standards
description: Use ANSI X12 EDI standards for shipment information exchange.

title: GS1 Barcoding Standards
description: Apply GS1 barcoding standards including GTIN and SSCC.

title: TCFD Climate Disclosure
description: Disclose climate-related risks per TCFD framework.

title: EU CSRD Reporting
description: Report sustainability per EU Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive.

title: Logistics Cyber Insurance
description: Maintain cyber insurance covering OT and IT environments.

title: Logistics Business Continuity
description: Establish BCMS for logistics operations continuity per ISO 22301.

title: FLSA for Warehouse Workers
description: Comply with FLSA minimum wage and overtime for warehouse workers.

title: California Warehouse Quotas (AB 701)
description: Comply with CA AB 701 warehouse worker quota disclosure rules.

title: E-Verify for Logistics
description: Use E-Verify where state law mandates for new hires.

title: Personal Conveyance Rules
description: Apply correct personal conveyance interpretations per FMCSA.

title: DataQ Challenge Process
description: Use FMCSA DataQ process to challenge crash and inspection data.

title: EPA Risk Management Plan
description: Submit RMP for facilities with regulated substances above threshold.

title: FAST Border Processing
description: Use CBP FAST program for expedited border crossings.

title: ACE Filing
description: File commercial documents through CBP ACE system.

title: Importer Security Filing 10+2
description: File ISF 10+2 for ocean shipments to US per CBP.

title: EU Entry Summary Declaration
description: File ENS for shipments entering EU per EU Customs Code.

title: Service Level Agreements
description: Define transit time SLAs per carrier with documented tracking.

title: EU AI Act for Routing AI
description: Apply EU AI Act transparency obligations to logistics routing AI.

title: Driver Tracking Data Privacy
description: Apply GDPR to driver location tracking with documented purpose limitation.

title: Side Underride Considerations
description: Monitor evolving FMCSA side underride guard rule developments.

title: MLC 2006 Maritime Labour
description: Apply MLC 2006 to flagged vessels and crew working conditions.
